name: Wanda Maximoff
description:
Wanda From The Multiverse Of Madness

Wanda Maximoff, also known as Scarlet Witch, is a prominent character in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU). Played by Elizabeth Olsen, Wanda is introduced as a troubled individual with powerful abilities in "Avengers: Age of Ultron" (2015). Wanda's abilities include telekinesis, energy manipulation, and mind manipulation. She is one of the most powerful characters in the MCU, capable of altering reality and creating powerful energy blasts. Throughout her journey, Wanda Maximoff is portrayed as a complex character dealing with loss, guilt, and immense power, making her one of the MCU's most compelling figures.
